title: End-of-Day PnL Attribution across Corporate Actions
notes: Red / G5 adversarial. The three components sum exactly to the daily change in mark-to-market book equity BY CONSTRUCTION -- verified on the sample: across 361 account-instrument-days the max |components - equity_change| is 0.0. Price PnL uses the split-invariant identity q_prev*(CF_d*m_d - CF_prev*m_prev) so a split re-bases shares and mark together with no P&L jump; the split factor is a running product EXP(SUM(LN(mult))). Marks are carried forward over gaps via a last-valid-on-or-before as-of (no IGNORE NULLS, portable). Previous trading session comes from LAG over the session_seq order (never calendar arithmetic). mssql deviation: natural log is LOG(x), so replace LN(...) with LOG(...) -- mssql omitted from engines on that basis. naive/3_no_dedup matches on the mild visible sample (no injected duplicate fills) and fails on the hidden red fixture; naive/4_full_grid_tle is correct but reconstructs the full accounts x instruments x sessions grid -> TLE at red scale. naive/1 (splits) and naive/2 (announced-vs-ex date) already diverge on the visible sample.
